zh.lifeSummary: Bridgett Null +於1525年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可。她和William Gorball至少有1個兒子。她去世於大約1612年在她的家鄉享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Bridgett Null +于1525年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可。她和William Gorball至少有1个儿子。她去世于大约1612年在她的家乡享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Null
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (also Nüll): variant of Noll and Nuelle 2.

variants.name: Noll
meanings: German: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names composed of the first element ending with -n + wald ‘rule’, for example Arnold and Reinwald .
South German: nickname for a rotund or naive person, from Middle High German nol ‘hillock, knoll’.

nameMeanings.name: Bridgett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Brighid (pronounced ‘breed’); . This was the name of an ancient Celtic goddess, which in Gaulish would have been Brigindos, meaning ‘the exalted one’. St Brigid of Kildare ( c.450– c.525 ) is one of the patron saints of Ireland. Very few facts are known about her life. She founded a religious house for women at Kildare, and is said to be have been buried at Downpatrick, where St Patrick and St Columba were also buried. Many of the stories of miracles told about St Brigid seem to be Christianized versions of pagan legends concerning the goddess. The popularity of the name was further reinforced throughout Europe, especially in Scandinavia in the form Birgit , as the name of the patron saint of Sweden ( 1304–73 ). She was a noblewoman of Irish stock who, after the death of her husband, founded an order of nuns, the Bridgettines. Later she went to Rome and attempted to introduce religious reforms there.

meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘the exalted one’. See Bridget .

meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘the exalted one’. See Bridget .

en.lifeSummary: Bridgett Null + was born in 1525, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with William Gorball. She died about 1612, in her hometown, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Bridgett Null + est née en 1525, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec William Gorball. Elle est décédée environ 1612, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Bridgett Null + wurde 1525 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit William Gorball mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1612 im Alter von 88 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Bridgett Null + è nata il nel 1525 nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con William Gorball. Morì circa 1612, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルク
ja.lifeSummary: Bridgett Null +は1525年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで生まれた。彼女はWilliam Gorballとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は約1612年に故郷で88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bridgett Null +(은)는 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났다. 그녀는 William Gorball(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1612년 그녀의 고향에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Bridgett Null + nasceu em 1525, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com William Gorball. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1612, em sua cidade natal, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Bridgett Null + родилась в 1525 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от William Gorball. Она умерла около 1612 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Bridgett Null + nació en 1525, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con William Gorball. Murió aproximadamente 1612, en su pueblo, a la edad de 88 años.
